title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
